template_data.headline_html: Five things to know before you certify.

items.title: Certs create set-asides, not wins
items.sub: They open contract pools — you still have to sell into them

items.title: 8(a) is the most powerful door
items.sub: Sole-source up to $4.5M, 9-year program — revenue caps close the window faster than you think

items.title: WOSB and SDVOSB shrink the pool
items.sub: Compete with fewer vendors in your category — same market, better odds

items.title: HUBZone is geography-based
items.sub: Principal office in a qualifying zone? Pricing preference on full-and-open contracts

items.title: Stack certifications intentionally
items.sub: 8(a) + WOSB + GSA Schedule together opens more doors than any one alone

template_data.image_headline: CERTIFICATIONS OPEN DOORS. YOU STILL HAVE TO KNOCK.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout, dark navy background. Bold headline top: 'CERTIFICATIONS OPEN DOORS. YOU STILL HAVE TO KNOCK.' with key icon. Left side: illustrated professional woman in blazer holding a badge/credential card, confident posture. Right side: 5 checklist rows, each with a green checkmark and a short 2-3 word label: 'SET-ASIDES ONLY', '8(A) SOLE-SOURCE', 'SMALLER POOL', 'HUBZONE EDGE', 'STACK THEM'. Bottom navy banner with short callout. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
